code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0

while i < n
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping and i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        skipping = false
      end
    when None
      skipping = false
    end
  end

  if i < n
    let start = i
    mut reading = true
    while reading and i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          reading = false
        else
          i = i + 1
        end
      when None
        reading = false
      end
    end
    if i > start
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in nums
  let len_s = list.len(sorted)
  mut pos = 0
  mut found = false
  mut searching = true
  while searching and pos < len_s
    match list.get(sorted, pos)
    when Some(v)
      if v == x
        found = true
        searching = false
      else if v > x
        searching = false
      else
        pos = pos + 1
      end
    when None
      searching = false
    end
  end
  if not found
    mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    while j < pos
      match list.get(sorted, j)
      when Some(v)
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
    while j < len_s
      match list.get(sorted, j)
      when Some(v)
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    sorted = new_sorted
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
